slo.critical_error_detection: Sentry event emitted and remotely readable within 15 minutes
slo.cost_anomaly_detection: single-call anomaly logged and Sentry event emitted same turn

metrics_backend.backend_status: scrape-ready for local or external Prometheus; no paid backend required

alerting.page_target: Sentry issue alice.observability.healthcheck_failed plus alert_routing routes
external_routes: ALICE_ALERT_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID with TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN for Telegram alerts

evals.budget_policy: cheap judge/model path; case caps configurable; every call lands in feedback/time-cost-log.jsonl

retention.feedback/telegram-history.jsonl: 30 days target; raw user text, local only
retention.feedback/paste-buffer.log: 30 days target; no raw paste body
retention.vendor_sentry: project setting; scrubbed, no default PII
retention.vendor_phoenix_local: local database; content attrs controlled by ALICE_TRACE_CONTENT
retention.vendor_langsmith: metadata/span attrs; content attrs controlled by ALICE_TRACE_CONTENT
retention.vendor_posthog: event names and sanitized metadata only

enterprise_readiness.local_single_user_target: 10/10 with all required artifacts fresh, behavior regression passing, remote readbacks live, and audit evidence present
enterprise_readiness.multi_user_saas_target: external_required until RBAC/SSO, tenant isolation, hosted metrics, paid paging, and larger labeled eval coverage exist

not_enterprise_complete_without: Multi-user RBAC/SSO/SAML and tenant isolation if Alice becomes a shared SaaS product
Hosted Prometheus/Grafana or Datadog for always-on charts outside the operator's machine
Paid paging escalation if the operator wants team on-call rotations beyond Telegram/webhook/Sentry
Larger labeled transcript eval suite before claiming population-level model quality
